description: Dedicated accessibility audit: WCAG 2.1 AA checklist for markup, contrast, keyboard navigation, focus management, forms, media, and ARIA — one line per violation with the concrete fix. Includes /a11y:audit.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
